title: Minimal domain pack loader: ontology + aliases
problem: Concept linking reads ontology via an ad-hoc parser in concept_linker.py and ignores aliases.yaml. Supplemental creativity concepts are hardcoded in core Python. Before real claim extraction from manual sources (ticket-088), the engine needs a reusable domain pack loader and alias-to-canonical resolution owned by the pack, not the core.
acceptance_criteria: Reusable domain pack loader reads ontology.yaml and aliases.yaml.
Concept linker maps alias phrases to canonical ontology concepts.
No hardcoded creativity-specific alias mappings in core engine.
Supplemental ontology labels moved to creativity pack YAML.
Missing/malformed pack files fail closed with clear errors.
Golden concept linking remains green; unit tests cover loader and aliases.
Safety audit passes; no model/cloud/API calls introduced.
non_goals: No scoring, evidence_types, claim_schema, or search_templates loading.
No source discovery, URL/PDF fetch, OpenAI/cloud, live LLM extraction.
No validator changes, schema migrations, or export changes.
rollback_plan: Revert domain_pack_loader, concept_linker alias wiring, and ontology.yaml additions.
